name: ai-dev-protocol
description: Team workflow protocol for AI-assisted software development: requirement intake, AI branch workflow, specs, scope control, merge-back, commits, handoff, and API sync.

interface.shortDescription: Team workflow skills for AI-assisted development
interface.longDescription: Use AI Dev Protocol to guide coding agents through requirement intake, AI branch creation, Chinese specs, implementation scope control, squash merge-back to the developer branch, Chinese commit messages, delivery handoff, and Apifox sync summaries.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Dev Protocol for this feature.
Help me clarify and implement one requirement.
Prepare a verified handoff and merge-back for this AI branch.
